title: anchor_height = scan_tip contract not documented at build_shielded_tx callsite
description: payment.rs lines 177-178 carry the correct comment: 'anchor_height = scan_tip: witnesses in spendable_notes() are valid at scan_tip, not at note.block_height'. build_shielded_tx's doc comment says only 'Block height at which the Sapling commitment tree was last updated'. A contributor adding a second call site to build_shielded_tx will likely pass note.block_height, causing silent anchor mismatch and proof failure. Fix: add to build_shielded_tx doc: 'Must equal WalletStore::scan_tip() — witnesses from spendable_notes() are rooted at the scan tip. Passing note.block_height causes anchor mismatch.'
